requirement_topic.en: MS IEC 62109-1 / MS IEC 62109-2 Safety Evidence — Malaysia ST Certificate of Approval and SIRIM QAS International
requirement_topic.zh: MS IEC 62109-1 / MS IEC 62109-2 安全证据——马来西亚ST批准证书和SIRIM QAS International
requirement_topic.zht: MS IEC 62109-1 / MS IEC 62109-2 安全證據——馬來西亞ST批准證書和SIRIM QAS International

summary.en: Under Malaysia's Electrical Supply Act 1990 (Act 447), regulated electrical equipment — including solar PV inverters — must obtain a Certificate of Approval (CoA) from the Energy Commission (Suruhanjaya Tenaga / ST) before they can be supplied or installed in Malaysia. The CoA is obtained through SIRIM QAS International (SIRIM QAS), which is the accredited conformity assessment body designated by ST. The relevant safety standards are MS IEC 62109-1 (Safety of power converters for use in photovoltaic power systems — Part 1: General requirements) and MS IEC 62109-2 (Part 2: Particular requirements for inverters), which are Malaysian Standards adopted from IEC 62109-1 and IEC 62109-2 respectively. Type-test evidence from an ILAC-accredited laboratory against MS IEC 62109-1/-2 (or the underlying IEC standards) is required as part of the SIRIM QAS CoA assessment. The ST regulated product list and CoA assessment scope should be confirmed directly with SIRIM QAS International and ST before planning the compliance pathway, as the list and applicable standards are subject to update.
summary.zh: 根据马来西亚《1990年电力供应法》（法令447），受管制电气设备——包括太阳能光伏逆变器——在马来西亚供应或安装前须从能源委员会（Suruhanjaya Tenaga / ST）取得批准证书（CoA）。CoA通过SIRIM QAS International（SIRIM QAS）取得，SIRIM QAS是ST指定的认可合格评定机构。相关安全标准为MS IEC 62109-1（光伏电力系统用功率变换器安全——第1部分：通用要求）和MS IEC 62109-2（第2部分：逆变器特殊要求），分别为马来西亚采纳IEC 62109-1和IEC 62109-2的马来西亚标准。SIRIM QAS CoA评估要求提供来自ILAC认可实验室、依据MS IEC 62109-1/-2（或基础IEC标准）进行的型式试验证据。在规划合规路径前，请直接向SIRIM QAS International和ST确认ST受管制产品清单和CoA评估范围，因清单和适用标准可能更新。
summary.zht: 根據馬來西亞《1990年電力供應法》（法令447），受管制電氣設備——包括太陽能光伏逆變器——在馬來西亞供應或安裝前須從能源委員會（Suruhanjaya Tenaga / ST）取得批准證書（CoA）。CoA通過SIRIM QAS International（SIRIM QAS）取得，SIRIM QAS是ST指定的認可合格評定機構。相關安全標準為MS IEC 62109-1（光伏電力系統用功率轉換器安全——第1部分：通用要求）和MS IEC 62109-2（第2部分：逆變器特殊要求），分別為馬來西亞採納IEC 62109-1和IEC 62109-2的馬來西亞標準。SIRIM QAS CoA評估要求提供來自ILAC認可實驗室、依據MS IEC 62109-1/-2（或基礎IEC標準）進行的型式試驗證據。在規劃合規路徑前，請直接向SIRIM QAS International和ST確認ST受管制產品清單和CoA評估範圍，因清單和適用標準可能更新。

standards_or_laws: MS IEC 62109-1 — Safety of power converters for use in photovoltaic power systems — Part 1: General requirements (Malaysian Standard adopting IEC 62109-1, cited in SIRIM QAS CoA assessment)

MS IEC 62109-2 — Safety of power converters for use in photovoltaic power systems — Part 2: Particular requirements for inverters (Malaysian Standard adopting IEC 62109-2, cited in SIRIM QAS CoA assessment)
Electrical Supply Act 1990 (Act 447) — Malaysia, basis for ST Certificate of Approval requirement for regulated electrical equipment
SIRIM QAS International — designated conformity assessment body for ST Certificate of Approval in Malaysia

summary.en: China's primary voluntary standard for PV grid-connected inverter safety is GB/T 37408-2019 (Technical Requirements for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters), which covers classification, environmental conditions, safety, electrical performance, EMC, and markings. GB/T 37408 is a China domestic recommended standard (GB/T designation) assessed by CNAS-accredited Chinese laboratories. It shares conceptual safety intent with IEC 62109-1/-2 but is not harmonised with IEC 62109 and is not accepted by SIRIM QAS International or Malaysia ST as equivalent to MS IEC 62109-1/-2 type-test evidence for CoA assessment.
summary.zh: 中国太阳能光伏逆变器安全的主要自愿性标准为GB/T 37408-2019（光伏并网逆变器技术要求），涵盖分类、环境条件、安全、电气性能、EMC和标识。GB/T 37408是由中国CNAS认可实验室评估的中国国内推荐性标准（GB/T标识）。其安全意图与IEC 62109-1/-2在概念层面相近，但未与IEC 62109协调，不被SIRIM QAS International或马来西亚ST接受为MS IEC 62109-1/-2型式试验证据的等效依据，不能用于CoA评估。
summary.zht: 中國太陽能光伏逆變器安全的主要自願性標準為GB/T 37408-2019（光伏並網逆變器技術要求），涵蓋分類、環境條件、安全、電氣性能、EMC和標識。GB/T 37408是由中國CNAS認可實驗室評估的中國國內推薦性標準（GB/T標識）。其安全意圖與IEC 62109-1/-2在概念層面相近，但未與IEC 62109協調，不被SIRIM QAS International或馬來西亞ST接受為MS IEC 62109-1/-2型式試驗證據的等效依據，不能用於CoA評估。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 37408-2019 — 光伏并网逆变器技术要求 (Technical Requirements for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters)

gap.en: Chinese GB/T 37408 safety certification does not satisfy SIRIM QAS International's MS IEC 62109-1/-2 type-test requirement for the Malaysian ST Certificate of Approval. Exporters must obtain MS IEC 62109-1/-2 (or IEC 62109-1/-2) type-test certificates from an ILAC-accredited laboratory covering the specific inverter model or family being supplied to Malaysia. Existing Chinese safety certificates based solely on GB/T 37408 should be supplemented with IEC 62109-1/-2 test reports before applying to SIRIM QAS International for CoA assessment. Confirm the current ST regulated product list category for PV inverters, applicable MS standards, and SIRIM QAS CoA assessment pathway directly with SIRIM QAS International before committing to a test programme.
gap.zh: 中国GB/T 37408安全认证不满足SIRIM QAS International对马来西亚ST批准证书（CoA）的MS IEC 62109-1/-2型式试验要求。出口商须从ILAC认可实验室取得涵盖供应至马来西亚的特定逆变器型号或系列的MS IEC 62109-1/-2（或IEC 62109-1/-2）型式试验证书。仅依据GB/T 37408的现有中国安全证书，在向SIRIM QAS International申请CoA评估前，应补充IEC 62109-1/-2测试报告。在启动测试计划前，请直接向SIRIM QAS International确认光伏逆变器的当前ST受管制产品清单类别、适用MS标准及SIRIM QAS CoA评估路径。
gap.zht: 中國GB/T 37408安全認證不滿足SIRIM QAS International對馬來西亞ST批准證書（CoA）的MS IEC 62109-1/-2型式試驗要求。出口商須從ILAC認可實驗室取得涵蓋供應至馬來西亞的特定逆變器型號或系列的MS IEC 62109-1/-2（或IEC 62109-1/-2）型式試驗證書。僅依據GB/T 37408的現有中國安全證書，在向SIRIM QAS International申請CoA評估前，應補充IEC 62109-1/-2測試報告。在啟動測試計畫前，請直接向SIRIM QAS International確認光伏逆變器的當前ST受管制產品清單類別、適用MS標準及SIRIM QAS CoA評估路徑。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory: ST Certificate of Approval required under Electrical Supply Act 1990 (Act 447) before regulated electrical equipment (including PV inverters) can be supplied or installed in Malaysia; SIRIM QAS International CoA assessment based on MS IEC 62109-1/-2 is the designated compliance route
mandatory_status.cn: Voluntary — GB/T 37408-2019 is a recommended national standard (GB/T designation); CQC/CGC voluntary certification available but not required under Chinese law

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] A solar PV inverter holding only Chinese GB/T 37408 certification cannot satisfy SIRIM QAS International's MS IEC 62109-1/-2 requirement for the Malaysian ST Certificate of Approval. Plan for MS IEC 62109-1/-2 (or IEC 62109-1/-2) type testing by an ILAC-accredited laboratory before applying to SIRIM QAS International for CoA assessment. Verify the current ST regulated product list category for PV inverters, applicable Malaysian Standards, SIRIM QAS CoA assessment scope, and model-family coverage requirements directly with SIRIM QAS International (sirimqas.com.my) and ST (st.gov.my) before committing to a test programme.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 仅持有中国GB/T 37408认证的太阳能光伏逆变器不能满足SIRIM QAS International对马来西亚ST批准证书（CoA）的MS IEC 62109-1/-2要求。请在向SIRIM QAS International申请CoA评估前，安排ILAC认可实验室进行MS IEC 62109-1/-2（或IEC 62109-1/-2）型式试验。在启动测试计划前，请直接向SIRIM QAS International（sirimqas.com.my）和ST（st.gov.my）核实光伏逆变器的当前ST受管制产品清单类别、适用马来西亚标准、SIRIM QAS CoA评估范围及型号系列覆盖要求。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 僅持有中國GB/T 37408認證的太陽能光伏逆變器不能滿足SIRIM QAS International對馬來西亞ST批准證書（CoA）的MS IEC 62109-1/-2要求。請在向SIRIM QAS International申請CoA評估前，安排ILAC認可實驗室進行MS IEC 62109-1/-2（或IEC 62109-1/-2）型式試驗。在啟動測試計畫前，請直接向SIRIM QAS International（sirimqas.com.my）和ST（st.gov.my）核實光伏逆變器的當前ST受管制產品清單類別、適用馬來西亞標準、SIRIM QAS CoA評估範圍及型號系列覆蓋要求。
